opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: [Parent reports] I found him slumped on the floor, he is barely breathing, and his lips are turning blue!
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Found unresponsive with slow breathing and blue lips, empty pill bottles nearby.

symptom_narrative.character: profound unresponsiveness with very slow, shallow breathing
